description: Phase 8 application orchestration for mealplan: implement a deterministic validation-first use case that composes domain stages and returns MealPlanResponse.

userStories.title: Add MealPlanCalculationService orchestration entrypoint
userStories.description: As an application caller, I want one deterministic service API so all calculation stages execute through a single use-case boundary.
acceptanceCriteria: Add `MealPlanCalculationService` in `src/mealplan/application/orchestration.py` with canonical API `calculate(request: MealPlanRequest) -> MealPlanResponse`.
Service accepts canonical `MealPlanRequest` and returns `MealPlanResponse` only.
Service has no mutable state and is deterministic for identical inputs.
Public application API is documented and type-annotated.
mypy --strict src passes.
pytest passes.

userStories.title: Enforce validation-first fail-fast execution
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want validation run first so invalid requests fail before domain calculations begin.
acceptanceCriteria: Orchestration calls canonical validation flow first via `validate_meal_plan_flow`.
Validation failure stops pipeline before energy, macro, fueling, periodization, or assembly calls.
Fueling and periodization consume normalized training data from validation output, not raw request payload fields.
Error typing remains deterministic as ValidationError or DomainRuleError for exit-code mapping compatibility.
Tests verify fail-fast ordering behavior.
mypy --strict src passes.
pytest passes.

userStories.title: Wire energy and macro stage composition
userStories.description: As an application service, I want to call Phase 4 domain services in order so top-level macro targets are produced deterministically.
acceptanceCriteria: Build typed UserProfile from validated request.
Call calculate_tdee_kcal and calculate_macro_targets with canonical arguments.
Preserve unrounded domain values until Phase 7 assembly boundary.
Tests verify stage outputs are passed correctly to downstream stages.
mypy --strict src passes.
pytest passes.

userStories.title: Wire training fuel stage composition
userStories.description: As an application service, I want to call Phase 5 fueling from normalized training input so training carbs are integrated into response output.
acceptanceCriteria: Convert validated and normalized training session into canonical zones mapping for fueling call.
Call calculate_training_carbs_g exactly once per request.
Training fuel stage remains deterministic and side-effect free.
Tests cover zero-training and mixed-zone representative inputs.
mypy --strict src passes.
pytest passes.

userStories.title: Treat training_session None as zero-training defaults
userStories.description: As a caller, I want omitted training session to be interpreted consistently so requests without training data still produce deterministic results.
acceptanceCriteria: If training_session is None, orchestration uses zero-training defaults with zones 1..5 all set to 0 and training_before_meal set to None.
Pipeline proceeds without validation failure for omitted training session.
Resulting training_carbs_g is exactly 0.0.
Integration tests verify omitted training session behavior in representative scenarios.
mypy --strict src passes.
pytest passes.

userStories.title: Wire periodization stage composition
userStories.description: As an application service, I want to call Phase 6 periodization allocator so meal-level carb distribution is derived from top-level carb targets and training context.
acceptanceCriteria: Call calculate_periodized_carb_allocation with canonical arguments carb_mode, daily_carbs_g, training_before_meal, and training_load_tomorrow.
Preserve Phase 6 precedence and override behavior without duplicating rules in application layer.
Tests verify representative periodized and non-periodized flows.
mypy --strict src passes.
pytest passes.

userStories.title: Wire meal split and response assembly stage
userStories.description: As an application service, I want to call Phase 7 assembly so final payload shape and rounding policies are applied consistently.
acceptanceCriteria: Call calculate_meal_split_and_response_payload with canonical top-level values and carb allocation map.
Parse and return final result as validated MealPlanResponse model instance.
No manual response dict mutation exists outside canonical assembly path.
Tests verify returned object type is MealPlanResponse.
mypy --strict src passes.
pytest passes.

userStories.title: Add representative application integration matrix
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want representative application-layer integration coverage so orchestration regressions are caught without CLI dependency.
acceptanceCriteria: Add representative success scenarios: periodized with training, non-periodized with training, and omitted training_session.
Add representative failure scenarios: validation failure and downstream domain failure propagation (including `meal_assembly.reconciliation`).
Tests execute `MealPlanCalculationService.calculate(...)` directly without CLI invocation.
Canonical Phase 8 integration test target is `tests/unit/test_application_orchestration.py`.
Assertions cover returned MealPlanResponse shape and critical top-level and meal invariants.
mypy --strict src passes.
pytest passes.

userStories.title: Document Phase 8 orchestration boundary and flow
userStories.description: As a contributor, I want clear docs for orchestration responsibilities so later CLI integration does not leak business logic into command handlers.
acceptanceCriteria: Update docs/ARCHITECTURE.md with explicit Phase 8 service boundary and stage sequence.
Update docs/REQUIREMENTS.md with functional orchestration flow notes.
Update docs/MODEL.md or contracts notes to reflect MealPlanResponse return contract at application boundary.
Docs state training_session None zero-training interpretation.
mypy --strict src passes.
pytest passes.
